mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(1) FROM course_like WHERE course_id = #{courseId} AND user_id = #{userId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO course_like (course_id, user_id, create_time) VALUES (#{courseId}, #{userId}, #{createTime})
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM course_like WHERE course_id = #{courseId} AND user_id = #{userId}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(1) FROM course_like WHERE course_id = #{courseId}
